reviews.comment:
Lamentable que los baños estén cerrados durante toda la noche. Deberían funcionar para quienen viajamos durante muchos km, siendo la única opción de YPF y además pertenecer al club YPF.

(Translated by Google)
It's unfortunate that the restrooms are closed all night. They should be open for those of us who travel long distances, as they're the only YPF option and also belong to the YPF club.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzOFlmcXlRRRAB

reviews.comment:
Todo parecia excelente, pero despues de unas horas, las milanesas estaban en mal estado, porque de 4 que fuimos 2 que comieron eso se intoxicaron mal. Dos dias descompuestos.

(Translated by Google)
Everything seemed excellent, but after a few hours, the breaded cutlets were spoiled. Out of the four of us, two who ate them got really sick. They were ill for two days.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURzOXZHNGFBEAE

reviews.comment:

(Translated by Google)
Good service, very attentive and very good hygiene

reviews.comment:
Todavía me acuerdo, cuando quisimos cargar combustible y tuvimos que esperar como 2 horas porque había para de Moyano.

(Translated by Google)
I still remember when we wanted to fill up with fuel and had to wait for about two hours because there was a stop in Moyano.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzaWJYQkl3EAE

reviews.comment:
Una YPF con todo lo necesario y en un lugar estratégico de la ruta.
En temporada alta seguramente tendrás que hacer una cola y esperar.
El motel no lo conozco, pero parece bueno, siempre está lleno.

(Translated by Google)
A YPF gas station with everything you need, conveniently located on the highway.
During peak season, you'll likely have to wait in line.
I don't know the motel, but it looks good; it's always full.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSUNzd2VDSWp3RRAB

reviews.comment:
Mitad de camino entre Buenos Aires y Salta. Estuvo en remodelación. Ya funciona nuevamente. Cómodo,limpio y buen servicio. Estación de Servicio YPF,comedor agradable y rica comida.

(Translated by Google)
Halfway between Buenos Aires and Salta. It was under renovation. It works again. Comfortable, clean and good service. YPF Service Station, pleasant dining room and delicious food.
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNMl9Hb053EAE

reviews.comment:
Una pena que no hayan aprovechado para remodelar, cuando remodelaron la estación de servicio. El motel parece abandonado o cerrado. La gente es súper atenta y hace lo que puede con los recursos que tiene pero... Vengo a este motel desde hace ocho años y es impresionante como ha ido cayendo... ojalá mejore...

(Translated by Google)
It's a shame they didn't take the opportunity to renovate when they remodeled the gas station. The motel looks abandoned or closed. The staff is incredibly helpful and does what they can with the resources they have, but... I've been coming to this motel for eight years and it's amazing how it's deteriorated... I hope it improves...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChZDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNZzV1YWJnEAE

reviews.comment:
(Translated by Google) Renovated gas station, modern and welcoming. Friendly and helpful staff. Don't miss the criollitos...delicious! The restrooms are also new, larger but still spotless.

(Original)
Rinnovata stazione carbutanti, moderna ed accogliente. Personale gentile e simpatico. Da non perdersi i criollitos...una bontà! Anche i servizi igienici nuovi,  più grandi ma sempre pulitissimi...
reviews.name: accounts/109853746269412609224/locations/5022790591955098090/reviews/ChdDSUhNMG9nS0VJQ0FnSURNaHFtNnpBRRAB

reviews.comment:
En remodelación, la están haciendo mas grande y por lo que vi  todo a nuevo.

(Translated by Google)
It's being remodeled; they're making it bigger, and from what I saw, everything is new.
